nodes.label: Cleff Rotating Animation
nodes.description: Animated GIF mascot depicting a small white robot character with glowing blue rectangular eyes, orange accent joints/arms, and two antennae on its head. The robot has a friendly, approachable appearance suitable for a UI mascot. Used as an animated decorative element (the 'Cleff' mascot) in the HSM Management frontend application.
nodes.ui_purpose: decorative mascot animation — likely used as a loading indicator, welcome element, or branding character in the React frontend
